title: Create Foundation/BufferTest.php with snapshot and cell mutation tests
acceptance_criteria: Buffer construction with dimensions creates empty Cell[][] grid
getCell returns Cell at valid coordinates
getCell returns Cell(' ', defaultStyle) for out-of-bounds (no throw)
fill(rect, Cell) fills all cells in rect
setString(x, y, string, Style) writes string left-to-right
setString truncates if string exceeds buffer width
draw copies content into another buffer correctly
